attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 							SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE 							BK_COMPANY_CODE,
SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  						BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 							BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(SBOOHA.CREATION_DATE 	AS TIMESTAMP(0)    ) START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST(CAST(SBOOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	START_SSP_DATE,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)   )	END_TV_DATETIME,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	END_SSP_DATE,
SBOOHA.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE 					SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
SBOOHA.ATTRIBUTE10  							PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
SBOOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER 							PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
CAST(SBOOHA.ORDERED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 		ORDER_DATETIME,
CAST(SBOOHA.BOOKED_DATE AS 	TIMESTAMP(0)   ) 	ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
SBOOHA.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE 					TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
CAST(NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 					INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
		CASE	
	WHEN	
		SBOOHA.ATTRIBUTE9 = 'YES' THEN 'Y' 
	WHEN	SBOOHA.ATTRIBUTE9='NO' THEN 'N' 
			ELSE	'='
		END	  									EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,
COALESCE (SBOOHA.PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED,'=') PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
COALESCE (SBOOHA.OPEN_FLAG,'=')  				SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG,
SBOOHA.ATTRIBUTE3 								CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME,
CAST(CAST(SBOOHA.attribute2 AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') 	PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE, 
CAST(SBOOHA.ATTRIBUTE1 AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 		FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME, 
NULL 											COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 					SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
SBOOHA.ATTRIBUTE14 								CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
SBOOHA.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE						CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
		CASE	
	WHEN	
		SBOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=2 THEN SBOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID 
			ELSE	SBOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
		END		ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE,
SBOOHA.ATTRIBUTE15 								SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME,
CAST (NULL 	AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 					RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE 				BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
NULL 											BK_DEAL_ID,
NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME 							BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
ESOS.NAME 										BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME, 
ESOT.NAME 										BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
SBOOHA.FOB_POINT_CODE 							BK_FOB_POINT_CODE,
SBOOHA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE 					BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
CAST(SBOOHA.CREATION_DATE 	AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 	BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
CAST(SBOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
SBOOHA.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 						BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
'ERP'   										BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,
'='												CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
SBOOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE 						SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
SBOOHA.HEADER_ID 								SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 						SS_CODE,
COALESCE(SBOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=')						CANCELLED_FLAG,
SBOOHA.PRICING_DATE        						PRICING_DATETIME,
NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 		SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NECAL_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 		BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  				SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
COALESCE (SSO_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY, -9999) 			RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
USER 											EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER 											EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )  	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
NULL 											ACTION_CODE,
'=' 											DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(SBOOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE ,'=')    ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME     ,
COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME 

FROM
			$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SBOOHA  
			INNER JOIN (
					$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
							ON( NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
						)
			ON	( SBOOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
			/* INNER JOIN     $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
			ON( SBOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT) */
			INNER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
			QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
			ON( SBOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

			LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL 
			ON(SBOOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID= NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT)
			INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO')
			INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
			ON(SBOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID AND	ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='BO')
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
			ON(	SBOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID=ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID 	AND	ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO')
			LEFT OUTER JOIN   (
					$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_ORIG
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_ORIG
							ON( NSSC_ORIG.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO_ORIG.SS_CODE)
							)
			ON	(CAST(CASE
						WHEN	SBOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=2 THEN SBOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID 
							ELSE	NULL	END	AS INTEGER) = SSO_ORIG.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
			AND	NSSC_ORIG.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
            ON	( SBOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )	
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_BILL
            ON	(SBOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT)	 
		   	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
   			ON( SBOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT    ) 
                     LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SELECT
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
, EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
) EFU_CR
ON
EFU_CR.USER_ID = SBOOHA.CREATED_BY
AND
EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO'                 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SEL 
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
) EFU_UPD
ON
EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SBOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
AND
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO'
             QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SBOOHA.HEADER_ID  ORDER	BY SBOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1

SELECT
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 							SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE 							BK_COMPANY_CODE,
SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  						BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 							BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(SUOOHA.CREATION_DATE 	AS TIMESTAMP(0)    ) START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST(CAST(SUOOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	START_SSP_DATE,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)   )	END_TV_DATETIME,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	END_SSP_DATE,
SUOOHA.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE 					SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE10  							PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
SUOOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER 							PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
CAST(SUOOHA.ORDERED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 		ORDER_DATETIME,
CAST(SUOOHA.BOOKED_DATE AS 	TIMESTAMP(0)   ) 	ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
SUOOHA.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE 					TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
CAST(NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 					INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
		CASE	
	WHEN	
		SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE9 = 'YES' THEN 'Y' 
	WHEN	SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE9='NO' THEN 'N' 
			ELSE	'='
		END	  									EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,
COALESCE (SUOOHA.PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED,'=') PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
COALESCE (SUOOHA.OPEN_FLAG,'=')  				SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG,
SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE3 								CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME,
CAST(CAST(SUOOHA.attribute2 AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') 	PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE, 
CAST(SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE1 AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 		FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME, 
NULL 											COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 					SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE14 								CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
SUOOHA.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE						CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
		CASE	
	WHEN	
		SUOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=2 THEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID 
			ELSE	SUOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
		END		ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE,
SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE15 								SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME,
CAST (NULL 	AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 					RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE 				BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
NULL 											BK_DEAL_ID,
NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME 							BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
ESOS.NAME 										BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME, 
ESOT.NAME 										BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
SUOOHA.FOB_POINT_CODE 							BK_FOB_POINT_CODE,
SUOOHA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE 					BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
CAST(SUOOHA.CREATION_DATE 	AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 	BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
CAST(SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
SUOOHA.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 						BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
'ERP'   										BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,
'='												CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
SUOOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE 						SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
SUOOHA.HEADER_ID 								SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 						SS_CODE,
COALESCE(SUOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=')						CANCELLED_FLAG,
SUOOHA.PRICING_DATE        						PRICING_DATETIME,
NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 		SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NECAL_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 		BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  				SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
COALESCE (SSO_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY, -9999) 			RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
USER 											EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER 											EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )  	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
NULL 											ACTION_CODE,
'=' 											DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(SUOOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE ,'=')    ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME  ,'UNKNOWN')  SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME  ,
COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME  ,'UNKNOWN') SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME
FROM
			$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SUOOHA  
			INNER JOIN (
					$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
							ON( NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
						)
			ON	( SUOOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
			/* INNER JOIN     $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
			ON( SUOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT) */
			INNER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
			QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
			ON (SUOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

			LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL 
			ON(SUOOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID= NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT)
			INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
			INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
			ON(SUOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID AND	ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
			ON(	SUOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID=ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID 	AND	ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
			LEFT OUTER JOIN   (
					$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_ORIG
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_ORIG
							ON( NSSC_ORIG.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO_ORIG.SS_CODE)
							)
			ON	(CAST(CASE
						WHEN	SUOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=2 THEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID 
							ELSE	NULL	END	AS INTEGER) = SSO_ORIG.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
			AND	NSSC_ORIG.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
            ON	( SUOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )	
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_BILL
            ON	(SUOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT)	 
		   	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
   			ON( SUOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT    )        
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SELECT
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
, EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
) EFU_CR
ON
EFU_CR.USER_ID = SUOOHA.CREATED_BY
AND
EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'                 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SEL 
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
) EFU_UPD
ON
EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
AND
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'                 
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SUOOHA.HEADER_ID  ORDER	BY SUOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1

SELECT
SALES_ORDER_KEY,
BK_DEAL_ID,
BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
XCAT_FLG
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV TV_3NF
WHERE END_TV_DATETIME   = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER WK
WHERE TV_3NF.SALES_ORDER_KEY = WK.SALES_ORDER_KEY
)
